title: Brooklyn Public Library — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Brooklyn Public Library (BPL) object schemas. Reconciles fields observed on BPL's public Drupal JSON:API (www.bklynlibrary.org/jsonapi — node--branch, node--event, node--book_profile, node--eres, node--digital_asset), the BiblioCommons catalog (bklynlibrary.bibliocommons.com), and BPL's two NYC Open Data assets. BPL is an independent nonprofit serving the borough of Brooklyn; its own numbering key is the Branch ID (field_branchid).

Borough.description: NYC borough. BPL serves Brooklyn, but the enum keeps the citywide set so the model joins to the rest of city government and to the sibling systems (NYPL = Manhattan/Bronx/Staten Island, Queens Public Library = Queens).

Address.description: Postal address, following the Drupal address field structure seen on node--branch (field_address).

DayHours.description: Open/close for a single day. BPL stores each day as seconds-from-midnight (field_hours_monday { from, to }).

from.description: Opening time in seconds from midnight (e.g. 32400 = 09:00).

to.description: Closing time in seconds from midnight (e.g. 72000 = 20:00).

WeeklyHours.description: A branch's weekly service hours, one DayHours per day (Drupal field_hours_monday … field_hours_sunday).

Geography.description: NYC geography spine — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

BranchReference.description: A reference to a BPL branch by its numbering key.

branchId.description: BPL Branch ID ('field_branchid', e.g. '01' = Central Library) — BPL's primary branch key.
